QF.id: III-C Prevention of Money Laundering Act_10

question.text: The Cash Transaction Report (CTR) for each month shall be submitted to FIU-IND by:

answer.text: Last day of the succeeding month

explanation.text: **The Logic:** As per Section 9.3.10, the CTR for each month shall be submitted to FIU-IND by 15th of the succeeding month. **The Trap:** Tax-related returns often have different deadlines which may cause confusion. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The same deadline (15th of the succeeding month) also applies to Non-Profit Organization Transaction Reports (NTRs).
